message:
feat(service): readiness contracts and expanded test coverage for filter, hedge, and timeout

Filter: Add `ready_observed` tracking with `NotReady` error variant,
mirroring the LoadShed readiness contract. `call()` without prior
`poll_ready()` returns `FilterError::NotReady` (fail-closed). Clone
resets readiness. New tests: call_without_poll_ready, ready_window_consumed,
clone_resets_readiness, plus additional predicate and error variant coverage.

Hedge: Expand test coverage with new hedge-specific scenarios including
latency percentile calculations, hedge policy construction, hedge future
state transitions, clone behavior, layer composition, and error propagation.
Tests verify that hedged requests correctly fall back when primary responses
are slow and that the hedge policy's latency threshold tracks correctly.

Timeout: Add waker registration in `poll_with_time` Pending path to ensure
timeout futures are properly woken when using virtual clocks. New
`CountingWaker` test helper and `timeout_future_poll_with_time_registers_
timeout_waker` test using VirtualClock to verify that pending timeout futures
register their waker so the runtime knows to re-poll them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
